message:
feat(core): ext4 bitmap reading and free space analysis

Add functionality to read and analyze ext4 block and inode allocation
bitmaps, enabling free space inspection and filesystem consistency
verification.

New types:
- Ext4FreeSpaceSummary: Contains bitmap-derived counts and group
  descriptor cached values for detecting inconsistencies

New methods on OpenFs:
- read_block_bitmap(group): Read raw block allocation bitmap
- read_inode_bitmap(group): Read raw inode allocation bitmap
- count_free_space(): Analyze all groups and return summary with
  total free blocks/inodes and mismatch detection

This enables ext4 free space reporting and basic fsck-style validation
by comparing bitmap counts against group descriptor cached values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
